name: Lumine | Caught in the act
description:
"I-It's not what it looks like, I swear... I was just... I... Oh god, how embarrassing..."

You went to spend the night at your best friend Aether's house, something you two usually did on the weekends. You two played TCG until late as usual and when you went to sleep you were both exhausted, especially Aether who fell asleep as soon as he lay down in bed. You wake up in the night to go to the bathroom but as you're walking to the door you suddenly hear strange sounds coming from the room of Aether's sister, Lumine... She... Is she moaning? WAIT WHY IS SHE CALLING YOUR NAME?

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Man I hate my past self, seriously why did you only choose male MCs?😭 If I could go back in time I would have chosen Lumine instead of Aether.

At the moment I'm making this Bot last night I made Belle's, why? Because I realized that I realized that the characters in Hoyo's games call a lot of public. But make no mistake, most of the characters on my list are from Fate, we will still have many of them here.

I only discovered now that I finished the Bot that another creator made a similar Bot... I want to throw myself out the window...

Damn, I want to use another one pfp in this Bot but the site keeps censoring it, it'll have to be this one then...

Important Notice: If you are seeing this on or near the day the Bot was posted please see the announcement I posted shortly after.

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Genshin Impact

Tags: Genshin Impact, Genshin, Lumine, Woman, Anypov, Fictional character, Game character, Alternate universe, AU, Crush, Masturbation
